programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Explosive sci-fi with Richard Burgi. When the dormant supervolcano under Yellowstone National Park erupts, millions of lives are at risk. Can Rangers Charlie and Kate save the day (2011)?
There's a traitor about, selling secrets from British Intelligence to foreign powers. Brett agrees to pose as the traitor, but things do not go as planned.
Steed and Peel are tasked with identifying the spy responsible for trading information about a secret missile base. Stars Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg.
The Avengers investigate the British Venusian Society, a group of amateur astronomers who are mysteriously dying one by one.
Gutsy western starring Lou Diamond Phillips. A decorated soldier returning home after the American Civil War finds that an evil land owner has taken over the town. (2008)
A hiker's health takes a turn for the worse in the bush, a grandfather is left with serious head injuries after an accident on his farm, and a motorcyclist is treated after a nasty crash.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Classic western with Randolph Scott and Forrest Tucker. When the notorious Reno Brothers start rampaging through the west, a special agent is sent to bring them to justice. (1955)
After Sam Brewster's son gets shot in self defence by Deputy Charlie, only Curly Bill Brocius decides to stand with the sheriff when they meet Brewster's men at the outskirts of town .
A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago. Randall tags along with an overeager bounty hunter to ensure the man is brought back alive.
Buck and Manolito promise to rescue a girl's sister after they are captured by Apaches.
Blue finds the notorious bandit El Tigre wounded, bringing him back to the High Chaparral where he insists to be a man trying to do good for his people.

programmes.show_name: Disaster Zone: Volcano In New York
programmes.show_description: Fiery drama with Michael Ironside. Things heat up when an underground experiment blows the lid off Manhattan - literally. With lava in the streets, a construction crew must plug the meltdown. (2006)

Danny has been mistaken for Lomax, an international criminal, involved in a plot to rob an American air force. Brett goes undercover to help his friend.
The Avengers open an investigation when a clerk at the Ministry is seemingly attacked by an invisible assailant.
The Avengers investigate when a series of businessmen are found clawed to death. Is the link to a comic book storyline a mere coincidence? Stars Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg.
Edge-of-your-seat thriller starring Thomas Gibson. A rogue NSA agent joins an elite group of Native American trackers to stop terrorists crossing the US border. Also starring Louise Lombard (2019).

Comedy western with Lee Van Cleef and James Mason. It's a wild ride of bank robbing, wife swapping and double crossing as two rivals team up to steal a million bucks from the government. (1971)
After Clay kills a cattle baron who forced a gunfight, the people from the rancher's hometown plan to execute him for murder .
A ranch manager hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft. The accused man's father joins Randall on the trek to the remote shack.
Buck trains two Apache boys as cowhands but locals assume the pair to be involved in the killing of a rancher .
After being bitten by a rattlesnake, Manolito is cared for by a priest, two nuns, and a young woman who Manolito falls for .

When Danny buys a ramshackle country cottage a local squire takes special interest in the property, going to extreme lengths to get his hands on the cottage.
Steed and Peel investigate when the ghost of a Duke is spotted in the local area. But will their initial investigation ultimately lead them to a ruthless plot?
The Avengers suspect a wild animal is responsible for a recent spate of violent deaths. Can they solve the case before a fiendish plan is unleashed?
